operation.name: InsertIgnore
operation.sql: INSERT IGNORE INTO auth_seq_state (user_id, perm_auth_key_id, seq, date, row_version) VALUES (:user_id, :perm_auth_key_id, :seq, :date, :row_version)

operation.name: SelectByUserAuthKey
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, perm_auth_key_id, seq, date, row_version FROM auth_seq_state WHERE user_id = :user_id AND perm_auth_key_id = :perm_auth_key_id LIMIT 1

operation.name: SelectForUpdate
operation.sql: SELECT user_id, perm_auth_key_id, seq, date, row_version FROM auth_seq_state WHERE user_id = :user_id AND perm_auth_key_id = :perm_auth_key_id LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE

operation.name: UpdateSeqDate
operation.sql: UPDATE auth_seq_state SET seq = :seq, date = :date, row_version = row_version + 1 WHERE user_id = :user_id AND perm_auth_key_id = :perm_auth_key_id
